response.global_analysis:
1. JSON Match: The vocal performance matches the Japanese song lyrics of 'The Everlasting Guilty Crown'. The dialogue matches the playful, fast-paced stream banter.
2. JSON Usage: The lyrics reference was fully utilized for the first section. The dialogue was transcribed manually with high precision, maintaining the context-aware translation and natural flow.
3. Timing & Pacing: Subtitles were structured to avoid cascading delays, aligning exactly with vocal delivery and utilizing split lines to match pauses.

subtitles.original: この歌が聴こえてる
subtitles.english: This song is being heard

subtitles.original: 生命ある全ての者よ
subtitles.english: To all those who are alive

subtitles.original: 真実はあなたの胸の中にある
subtitles.english: The truth lies within your heart

subtitles.original: 嵐の海は静まった
subtitles.english: The stormy sea has calmed down

subtitles.original: 失ったものは数えきれなくとも
subtitles.english: Even if the things lost are countless

subtitles.original: あぁ...
subtitles.english: Ah...

subtitles.original: この歌が聴こえてる
subtitles.english: This song is being heard

subtitles.original: 世界中の寄る辺なき者よ
subtitles.english: To all the helpless people in the world

subtitles.original: 希望はあなたの胸の中にある
subtitles.english: Hope lies within your heart

subtitles.original: 悲しみの夜を越える時
subtitles.english: When you overcome the night of sadness

subtitles.original: 必ずあなたは生きていく強さを
subtitles.english: You will surely have the strength to live on

subtitles.original: あぁ...
subtitles.english: Ah...

subtitles.original: 持てるから
subtitles.english: Because you will have it

subtitles.original: あー！できた！できた！
subtitles.english: Ah! We did it! We did it!

subtitles.original: できた！イェーイ！
subtitles.english: We did it! Yay!

subtitles.original: あつい、あつい。
subtitles.english: So hot, so hot.

subtitles.original: もふもふテール！ あ、しっぽ見せて。
subtitles.english: Fluffy tail! Oh, show our tail.

subtitles.original: おお、揺れてる。
subtitles.english: Whoa, it's swaying.

subtitles.original: 揺れてる、揺れてる。 1、2、3...
subtitles.english: Swaying, swaying. One, two, three...

subtitles.original: どっちが大きい？
subtitles.english: Which one is bigger?

subtitles.original: 私の方が長い！ 私のはもふもふ！
subtitles.english: Mine is longer! Mine is fluffy!

subtitles.original: イェーイ！ここに来てくれてありがとう。
subtitles.english: Yeah! Thank you for being here.

subtitles.original: 彼女を見て！見て！
subtitles.english: Look at her! Look at her!

subtitles.original: まず自己紹介してね。 あ、はーい！
subtitles.english: You should introduce yourself first. Oh, hi!

subtitles.original: あなたは誰？この謎の生き物は誰？耳は何個あるの？
subtitles.english: Who are you? Who is this mysterious creature? How many ears do you have?

subtitles.original: 私は謎の生き物。
subtitles.english: I'm a mysterious creature.
One, two, three, four...
Four! Four of them, it's four! Five, six, seven...

subtitles.original: 6、7、8個の耳。 もう、やだ。
subtitles.english: Six, seven, eight ears. Oh, geez.

subtitles.original: あなたは誰？自己紹介して！ストップ！
subtitles.english: Who are you? Introduce yourself! Stop!

subtitles.original: ハロー！チャッティ！ハイ、デリコです。4つの耳を持つ狐で...
subtitles.english: Hello! Hi, Chatty! Hi, I'm Delyko, and I am a, yeah, four-eared fox...

subtitles.original: そして、こちらの誕生日ガールの自称親友です！ハハ！
subtitles.english: ...and self-proclaimed best friend of birthday girl over here! Haha!

subtitles.original: 私のこと大好きなんだよね？ 大好きだよ。
subtitles.english: She loves me very much, doesn't she? I love her very much.

subtitles.original: イェーイ！ イェーイ！
subtitles.english: Yeah! Yeah!

subtitles.original: お祝いに来てくれて本当にありがとう...
subtitles.english: Yeah, thank you so much for being here to celebrate...

subtitles.original: 呼んでくれてありがとう！一緒に踊れて本当に良かった。
subtitles.english: Thank you for having me! It was so nice to dance with you.

subtitles.original: 今日はあなたにたくさんの情熱と決意を届けるために来ました...
subtitles.english: I have come here today to bring you a lot of passion and determination...

subtitles.original: 毎日美しいアートを描く時に解き放つべき情熱をね！
subtitles.english: ...that you need to unleash when you're doing your beautiful art every single day!

subtitles.original: 情熱！決意！これからは超情熱的になるよ！
subtitles.english: Passion! Determination! I will be very passionate from now on!

subtitles.original: 今すぐ解き放って。もう待てない。ずっと踊ってたんだから。情熱をちょうだい！私に...
subtitles.english: I need you to unleash it now. I can't wait any longer. I've been dancing this whole time. Give me passion! Give me a...

subtitles.original: ペンをちょうだい！タブレットを！何でもいいから！
subtitles.english: ...pen, give me a tablet! Anything!

subtitles.original: やるんだ！解き放て！悪魔を解き放て！情熱を見せて！
subtitles.english: Just do it! Unleash! Unleash the demon! Show the passion!

subtitles.original: 解き放つ！ごめんねみんな、もう行かなきゃ。見てくれてありがとう...
subtitles.english: Unleash! Sorry, guys, I have to go now. Thank you so much for watching...

subtitles.original: 違う、それじゃない！その決意じゃない！そうじゃない、それじゃないよ！
subtitles.english: No, not that! Not that determination! Not that doing, not that!

subtitles.original: あなたが続けて。ライブを引き継いで。みんなありがとう、私は行くね。
subtitles.english: You will continue. You continue my live. Thank you so much everyone, I'm gonna leave you.

subtitles.original: だめ、行かせない！私を置いていかないで！
subtitles.english: No, she won't! Don't leave me!

subtitles.original: 置いてっちゃうよ。 だめ！
subtitles.english: I'm gonna leave you. Don't!

subtitles.original: 次の曲のダンス知ってる？
subtitles.english: Do you know the dance for the next song?

subtitles.original: すごく楽しいよ。
subtitles.english: It's gonna be very fun.

subtitles.original: え、私も参加していいの？
subtitles.english: Ay, you want me to join?

subtitles.original: そう、そう！ううん、今すぐライブやらなきゃ、見せてあげて。
subtitles.english: Yeah, yeah! No, no, you have to do the live now, let's show them.

subtitles.original: 今すぐライブやるの？もう？よし、準備はいいよ。
subtitles.english: I have to do the live now? Already? All right, I'm ready.

subtitles.original: 見せて、見せて、見せて！
subtitles.english: Show me, show me, show me!

subtitles.original: うわあああああ！
subtitles.english: Uaaaaargh!

subtitles.original: よし！決意を解き放て、そうだ、そうだ、そうだ！
subtitles.english: Yes! Unleash the determination, yes, yes, yes, yes!

subtitles.original: そして次は、誕生日ガールの番！
subtitles.english: And now, birthday girl time!

subtitles.original: うわ、うわ、うわ、うわ！
subtitles.english: Whoa, whoa, whoa, whoa!

subtitles.original: ヘイ、ヘイ、ヘイ。
subtitles.english: Hey, hey, hey.

subtitles.original: 見ちゃった。見ちゃった。
subtitles.english: I saw that. I saw that.

subtitles.original: 見てない、見えてないよ。
subtitles.english: You can't, you didn't see that.

subtitles.original: みんな見えた？私は見えたよ。
subtitles.english: Did you see that? Because I saw it.

subtitles.original: あ、見えてないよ。見えてない。ステージから見るべきだよ。
subtitles.english: Ah, you didn't see it. You didn't see it. You should see it from the stage.

subtitles.original: 私たちのピンクと黒の組み合わせって...
subtitles.english: Our pink and black together is...

subtitles.original: すべて見えたよ、他には何も見えてないよ！
subtitles.english: You saw everything! You did not see anything else!

subtitles.original: もう、すごく乱暴だね、でもいいよ！素晴らしい、決意がみなぎってきてる！
subtitles.english: God, you're so violent, that's good! That's good, the determination is coming out!

subtitles.original: 情熱が溢れ出してる！情熱を解き放て！ 情熱的になるよ！
subtitles.english: The passion is coming out! Unleash the passion! I'll be passionate!

subtitles.original: 情熱を、お願い。テンション爆上がりだから、お願い、落ち着いて。私には無理。
subtitles.english: The passion, please. I'm hypemaxing, please, relax. I can't do that.

subtitles.original: ごめん、ごめん。 よし、おいで、おいで、おばあちゃん、おいで。
subtitles.english: Sorry, sorry. Okay, come here, come here, grandma, come here.

subtitles.original: これで大丈夫。
subtitles.english: This is okay.

subtitles.original: 彼女は話したがってる、絶対に話したがってるよ。
subtitles.english: She wanted to talk, she definitely wanted to talk.

subtitles.original: 話したい！何について話す？
subtitles.english: I want to talk! What do you want to talk about?

subtitles.original: あなたが話したがってるって言ったの。 話したい。
subtitles.english: I said you wanted to talk. I want to talk.

subtitles.original: 私をおばあちゃん呼ばわりするなんて、よくもそんなことを！よくもそんなことを！
subtitles.english: You called me grandma, how freaking dare you! How freaking dare you!

subtitles.original: ちょっと、ちょっと！ こっちおいで！こっちおいで！
subtitles.english: Hey, hey! Come here! Come here!

subtitles.original: 自称おばあちゃんは誰？ 私はすごく落ち着いてるよ！
subtitles.english: Who is the self-proclaimed grandma? I am very much relaxed!

subtitles.original: 私が繰り出すこれらすべての動き、ほら、クレイジーなダンスとか。
subtitles.english: All these moves I pull out, you know, like all the crazy dance.

subtitles.original: 本当にタフなダンスだったよね？
subtitles.english: Yeah, yeah, yeah. That was such a tough dance, was it?

subtitles.original: あぁ、本当に大変だった。 彼女が夕食を奢ってくれるんだ...
subtitles.english: Oh, it was so hard. She's gonna treat me for dinner...

subtitles.original: ...彼女の誕生日のお祝いにね。 そう、私の誕生日！
subtitles.english: ...to celebrate her birthday. Yeah, it's my birthday!

subtitles.original: そう、そう！ あなたが、あなたが私に夕食を奢るべきだよ。
subtitles.english: Yes, yes! You should, you should treat me for dinner.

subtitles.original: 誕生日の主役さん、私に何を買ってくれるの？
subtitles.english: What are you gonna get for me, birthday girl?

subtitles.original: 実は...
subtitles.english: Actually...
